title: Tutorial 10: Wallet Upgrade — READY to CHIPI (Next.js + Clerk)
body:
**May** — Starknet already has millions of Argent X wallets. Those users have READY-type wallets. Chipi uses a different, more powerful wallet type (SNIP-9 with session keys). This tutorial proves we can upgrade existing wallets to Chipi — without losing funds, without creating a new address. If this works, every Argent X user is a potential Chipi user. That's the difference between starting from zero and starting from millions.

## Framework: Next.js (App Router)
## Auth Provider: Clerk

## Docs pages to follow (in order)

1. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/guides/wallet-upgrades
2. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/guides/custom-wallet-types
3. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-update-wallet-encryption
4. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/methods/prepare-wallet-upgrade
5. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/methods/execute-wallet-upgrade

## Features to test

- [ ] Detect wallet type (READY vs CHIPI)
- [ ] Prepare wallet upgrade (get typed data)
- [ ] Execute wallet upgrade (sign + submit)
- [ ] Verify wallet type changed after upgrade
- [ ] Verify funds preserved after upgrade
- [ ] Update wallet encryption after upgrade
- [ ] Session keys work on upgraded wallet

## Hooks to exercise

- `useUpdateWalletEncryption`
- `useGetWallet` (check wallet type)
- `prepareWalletUpgrade` (backend method)
- `executeWalletUpgrade` (backend method)

## Deliverables

- [ ] Working project in `tutorials/10-wallet-upgrade/`
- [ ] Clean clone works
- [ ] `VALIDATION.md` with pass/fail
- [ ] Every hook/method above used in code
- [ ] Recording: 5-8 min. You've mastered the upgrade flow — comment **upgrade-master** to unlock your final tutorial
- [ ] All bugs filed
- [ ] YouTube video link in PR description

## Use case ideas (mention in your recording)

- Migration tool for Argent X users joining Chipi
- Multi-wallet management app
- Account recovery flow

## Your impact

Unlocks the existing Starknet user base. Migration path = growth.
